title: Unread Notification Numbers
excerpt: At the moment, as soon as you click the notification icon, it clears the unread number from view (even if you haven’t read all your notifications), it would be really handy if this worked the same as email inboxes do, wh…

posts.author: Charley (Charley)
posts.cookedHtml:
At the moment, as soon as you click the notification icon, it clears the unread number from view (even if you haven’t read all your notifications), it would be really handy if this worked the same as email inboxes do, where the unread number counts down depending on how many unread notifications are in your inbox, and doesn’t clear that notification from view when you click the icon.

This would be handy for our business as we are constantly flicking between things and don’t want to forget that we have unread notifications in our inbox
